name: abp-agent-skills
description: ABP Framework development skills for AI coding tools — framework infrastructure, published as versioned per-domain plugins.

plugins.name: abp-cli
plugins.description: ABP CLI and ABP Studio CLI: choosing a solution architecture, creating solutions, updating packages, installing client libraries, and generating proxies.

plugins.name: abp-module-development
plugins.description: Building ABP modules with DDD layers: modules, aggregates, application services, DTOs, validation, error handling, object mapping, and module customization.

plugins.name: abp-data-access
plugins.description: Data access in ABP: EF Core and MongoDB integration, migrations, custom repositories, units of work, data filters, concurrency, connection strings, seeding, and Dapper.

plugins.name: abp-authorization
plugins.description: Authorization in ABP: permission definitions, authorization checks, current user, and resource-based authorization.

plugins.name: abp-authentication
plugins.description: ABP authentication: OpenIddict server/validation configuration, tokens, and dynamic claims.

plugins.name: abp-multitenancy
plugins.description: ABP multi-tenancy: tenant-aware entities, current tenant resolution, tenant switching, per-tenant databases, and data isolation.

plugins.name: abp-api
plugins.description: Exposing and consuming ABP HTTP APIs: conventional/auto controllers, integration services, dynamic and static C# client proxies, versioning, Swagger, and CORS.

plugins.name: abp-ui
plugins.description: ABP UI development for Blazor, Angular, and MVC/Razor: pages, lists and forms, module UI extensions, menus, theming, localization, bundling, and browser JS API consumption.

plugins.name: abp-infrastructure
plugins.description: ABP cross-cutting infrastructure: configuration, logging, JSON serialization, GUIDs, date/time, string encryption, image processing, cancellation tokens, correlation IDs, Autofac & interceptors, settings/features, audit logging, and AI integration.

plugins.name: abp-runtime
plugins.description: ABP runtime services and hosting: distributed/hybrid/entity caching, distributed locking, background jobs/events/workers, email/SMS/text-templating, production & cluster hosting, web request security, and app URLs.

plugins.name: abp-files
plugins.description: File handling in ABP: BLOB storing containers and providers, and the virtual file system.

plugins.name: abp-realtime
plugins.description: Real-time features in ABP: SignalR hubs, automatic hub routes, authorization, and clients.

plugins.name: abp-microservices
plugins.description: ABP microservice patterns: integration services vs distributed events, outbox/inbox, and Dapr integration.

plugins.name: abp-testing
plugins.description: Testing ABP applications: integration test infrastructure, UI and component tests (Angular, MVC/Razor), test data seeding, authorization, and multi-tenant test scenarios.

plugins.name: abp-upgrade
plugins.description: Upgrading ABP applications across versions: the abp CLI update flow, migration guides, and handling breaking changes.
